name: obsidian-pokedex
description: Browse and search Pokemon (Gen 1-3) via PokeAPI, right inside Obsidian.

scripts.deploy: bun esbuild.config.mjs production && mkdir -p test-vault/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-pokedex && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css test-vault/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-pokedex/ && mkdir -p "/Users/lhak/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/lhakZettel/.obsidian/plugins/pokedex" && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "/Users/lhak/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/lhakZettel/.obsidian/plugins/pokedex/"
